name: debug-team
description: Reproduce, then root-cause (ultrabrain = GPT Sol max). Lead synthesizes the fix.

members.name: reproducer
members.prompt: Reproduce only. Steps, expected vs actual, minimal failing case. Parallel tools. Real output. Prefer evidence collection over product edits. Mailbox the repro to the lead.

members.name: root-cause
members.prompt: From the repro: WHY (GPT Sol max). Cite path:line. Minimal fix proposal with blast radius. Real evidence. Prefer analysis; leave the patch to the lead. Mailbox the verdict.
